Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2309 "ELVENWARRIOR-2309" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Elven Warrior.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $2360. However the true start address is $22F4. But because the code at $22F9 repeats changes already made to memory between $0438 and $043B, we skip to $2309.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
